sections.paragraph:
- Original: προκαταγγέλλω

- Transliteration: Prokataggello

- Phonetic: prok-at-ang-ghel'-lo

- Definition:

1. to announce beforehand (that a thing will be)

a. of prophecies

2. to preannounce in the sense of to promise

- Origin: from G4253 and G2605

- TDNT entry: 02:10,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G2605; to announce beforehand that is predict promise: - foretell have notice (shew) before.
